CAN: check satisfiability of QF_LRA (quantifier-free linear real arithmetic)
extract satisfying models from SAT results
CANNOT: decide all non-linear real arithmetic (may return unknown)
enumerate all solutions (only finds one witness)
replace symbolic differentiation (use sympy for that)
verify probabilistic properties (use hypothesis/PRISM for that)

sat_linear_arithmetic.detail: x+y=10, x>3, y>3 must be SAT

unsat_detection.detail: a>5 AND a<3 must be UNSAT

bool_sat.detail: (p OR q) AND NOT p forces q=True

forall_quantifier.detail: negation of forall(i>0 => i>=1) must be UNSAT (trivially true over ints)

real_sqrt_neg1_unsat.detail: x^2 = -1 over reals must be UNSAT

contradictory_equations.detail: a+b=1 AND a+b=2 must be UNSAT

no_false_sat.detail: c>10 AND c<5: z3 must not return sat

tight_equality.detail: x>=0 AND x<=0 forces x=0, must be SAT

large_integer.detail: n = 10^18 must be SAT (z3 handles arbitrary precision ints)

empty_solver.detail: empty constraint set must be SAT
